Data.Label: Beginning
Values: 22 BBY, establishment of the Grand Army of the Republic (declaration of war)
22 BBY, First Battle of Geonosis (open warfare begins)

Data.Label: Outcome
Values: Collapse and occupation of the Confederacy of Independent Systems, leading to the formation of various Separatist holdouts
Supreme Chancellor Sheev Palpatine declares himself Galactic Emperor and reforms the Galactic Republic into the Galactic Empire thus restoring the Sith Empire
Jedi Knight Anakin Skywalker falls to the dark side and becomes Darth Vader
Extermination of most Jedi through issuance of Order 66 and the dissolution of the Jedi Order
